name: Garbanzos and Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a pot and stir well.
2. Do not include the cooked couscous at this stage.
3. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours (or high for 3-4 hours).
4. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, add the pre-cooked couscous.
5. Serve to 6 to 8 people.
